title: scutellaria omeiensis var. omeiensis
intro: Scutellaria omeiensis var. omeiensis, also known as Omei skullcap, is a plant species belonging to the mint family, Lamiaceae. It is widely used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Scutellaria omeiensis var. omeiensis include reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and neuroprotective effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
